visual_description: A short‑haired person in a striped sweater stands at a desk beneath a lit lamp, facing a door with "REDRUM" written on it. The view shifts to a bedroom where the same person, now holding a knife, faces a woman lying in bed under a patterned blanket. The woman in the bed, wearing a blue robe over a green shirt, lifts the blanket and looks toward the person with the knife.
